span.p:
One served turn crosses the boundary.
Who authored each slice of its value?

div.style: color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
On a proxy or subscription seat, faster belongs to the provider column -
fak relays it, marked OBSERVED, and does not claim it.
Adopt for the left column; the right column arrives only when
the model lives inside the kernel.
